title: A social innovator who makes linkages
description: An abstract describing the Eatmosphere initiative, a social entrepreneurship project that fosters sustainability in the agrifood system by linking farmers, chefs, consumers, and industry to enhance circularity and reduce food waste. It outlines practical projects such as dinner-on-the-field events and a CSA-based organic tomato sauce to generate fair incomes, support educational activities, and strengthen relationships across the food chain.
